title: Onboarding - Eula page - Continue
scenario: Onboarding EULA checkbox must be checked before Continue button becomes active on first launch of Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time.
Observe the 'Well hello, first things first...' onboarding screen.
Locate the checkbox for agreeing to the Poly User License Agreement and Privacy Policy.
Tap the Continue button without checking the checkbox.
Check the checkbox to agree to the EULA and Privacy Policy.
Tap the Continue button after checking the checkbox.
expected: The Continue button is disabled until the checkbox is checked. Tapping Continue without checking the box does nothing. After checking the box and tapping Continue, the 'Up-to-Date' page appears with information about using Poly Lens for updates, along with a Skip button.
